statement.p: Mackenzies annual property tax had been {\$4{,}770}\text{.} But she did some renovation to her house that added more square footage, and now the annual property tax is {\$5{,}490}\text{.} The county assesses property tax at a rate of {\$2.27} per square foot. How much area did Mackenzie add to her home? Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
